title: gpt-image-2
prompt: Primary request: Flat editorial technical infographic on deep navy background with warm terracotta and gold accents and subtle paper texture. Center: a large 'BaseTool' ID card with labeled fields: name, capability, provider, runtime, input_schema, output_schema, dependencies, best_for, fallback_tools, agent_skills, quality_score, latency_p50. Left: 'ToolRegistry' with a magnifying glass scanning a folder tree 'tools/...', auto-discovering modules. Right: 'Selector' scoring multiple providers (TTS, image, video) on a 7-axis radar chart labeled task_fit, output_quality, control, reliability, cost_efficiency, latency, continuity, with an arrow to fallback_tools. Top: stylized Agent reads the BaseTool card. Bottom: 'ToolResult' output box. Clean vector shapes, readable labels, no extra text, no UI controls.
